scrapedName: Best of Northern Vietnam: Hanoi, Sapa & Halong 6 days

itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival – Food Tour
itinerary.description:
Upon arrival at Noi Bai International Airport, you will be transferred to your hotel in Hanoi for check-in and some time to relax before your evening adventure. At around 17:30, our tour guide will meet you in front of Shinhan Bank, 14 Le Thai To Street, Hang Trong Ward, Hoan Kiem District, and escort you on a delightful Hanoi Street Food Tour. This walking-and-eating journey will lead you through the bustling Old Quarter, where you’ll discover both the flavors and the charm of local life. The menu may vary depending on the day, but typical dishes often include:

Pho Bo (Vietnamese Beef Noodle...

itinerary.title: Hanoi Half-day City Tour - Bus To Sapa
itinerary.description:
Morning

Begin your second day of travel with a city tour in Hanoi and learn more about the ancient capital. You acquaint yourself with Hanoi Old Quarter's serene atmosphere and these must-visit sites:

Start exploring Vietnam's earliest university, the Temple of Literature, where the country's aristocracy, mandarins, and elite learned. Come to Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, where the legendary founding father of contemporary Vietnam is currently resting in eternal peace. Then head to One Pillar Pagoda, the most famous one in Vietnam has a unique design like a lotus blooming from water. Visit Ho Chi M...

itinerary.title: Trekking to Ethnic Villages in Sapa - Y Linh Ho - Lao Chai - Ta Van
itinerary.description:
Distance & Est. time: Trekking 13 km

Have breakfast at your hotel before beginning your trekking adventure in Lao Cai with our local tour guide. The trekking path includes Y Linh Ho, a tiny town located beside the Muong Hoa River, and Lao Chai, a Black Hmong community famed for its remarkable indigo blue clothes and vestiges of history. After lunch, spend time learning about the local culture and then return to Sapa and continue to visit Ta Van Village, a Zay people's settlement. You will see the houses of this ethnic minority built among the poetic terraced fields

itinerary.title: Fansipan – Back to Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

After enjoying a hearty breakfast in Sapa, you will be transferred to the Fansipan Cable Car Station for an extraordinary journey. Step into the cable car and glide over the majestic Hoang Lien Son mountain range, admiring breathtaking views of terraced valleys and mist-covered peaks below. To conquer the “Roof of Indochina,” prepare for a climb of about 600 stone steps, which typically takes 1.5 hours. Upon reaching the summit of Fansipan (3,143m), you’ll be rewarded with sweeping panoramic views that stretch across mountains, valleys, and distant horizons. Take your time to explore ...

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Overnight Cruise in Halong Bay
itinerary.description:
Morning

Around 08:00 - 08:30, have breakfast at the hotel before being transferred to the well-known Northern destination: Halong Bay. The check-in time on the cruise is 11:30 - 12:00. You will be welcomed by kind crew staff with a free cool welcome drink and enjoy a delicious lunch with seafood made by professional chefs. There is beautiful emerald water and thousands of giant to small strange limestone islands that you should take in while savoring lunch. Afternoon

Enroll in some activities after the break, such as a tour to the caverns in Halong Bay, kayaking, or swimming in the clear wat...

itinerary.title: Disembark Halong Bay Cruise - Return to Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

A Tai Chi lesson before breakfast in the early morning will give you a fresh start on your second day in Halong. (This activity may be different with some cruises so you should ask our sales consultant for details.)

After that, the boat will take you to see the last attraction on the itinerary, you can visit one of the most beautiful caves: Trung Trang Cave, Sung Sot Cave, Dark & Bright Cave, etc. Check out and head to the restaurant for brunch, which is provided on the way to the cruise return to the main port. Around 11:30, disembark and take a transfer back to Hanoi. Notes:

If yo...

highlights: Designed for travelers with limited time who have a passion for Vietnam's nature, landscapes, culture, and people
Discover the top must-see places in North Vietnam including Hanoi, Sapa, and Halong Bay.

Offer a variety of exciting & highlight activities, including overnight train journeys, trekking to ethnic villages, cultural and historical exploration, scenic countryside, and a relaxing overnight cruise in Halong Bay
included: Accommodation in TWN/ DBL sharing accommodation at hotel, except overnight on train and home-stay (if any)
All transport within Vietnam (excluding airport pick up & see off), as per itinerary.
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Sharing luxury limousine Hanoi - Sapa - Hanoi
Shuttle bus Hanoi - Ha Long Bay - Hanoi
Meals as indicated in the program
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
